title: Dragoons [Dragons and Fantasy Modpack]
description: A mythical adventure where dragons, magic, and survival collide — unleash your power in a world forged by fire and ice.
body:
![image 1.1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/78d8176ab198d1e937aa741fbe40352d0cd042f0.png)

Step into a world where dragons rule the skies and ancient beasts have returned to reclaim their thrones. This modpack focuses on magic, adventure, and survival, featuring the legendary Ice and Fire mod at its core. Hunt, tame, or battle mighty dragons of fire, ice, and lightning as you explore forgotten ruins, craft legendary weapons, and uncover the secrets of a land teeming with mythical creatures.
Whether you seek glory as a fearless dragon slayer or dream of soaring through the skies on your own dragon companion, this world is yours to conquer.
